info.title: Course Manager Backend
info.description: Plantilla backend: FastAPI + Neon(Postgres) + Redis + SMTP + IA

schema.title: Response List Subjects Api V1 Academic Subjects Get
Response List Courses Api V1 Academic Courses Get
Response List Students Api V1 Academic Students Get
Response List Evaluations Api V1 Academic Evaluations Get
Response List Enrollments Api V1 Academic Enrollments Get
Response List Evaluation Grades Api V1 Academic Evaluation Grades Get
Response List Ai Model Configs Api V1 Stats Ai Model Configs Get

pass_rate.title: Pass Rate
pass_rate.description: Fracción de aprobados (escala >= 3, nota >= 50) entre los calificados (0–1)

completion_rate.title: Completion Rate
completion_rate.description: Porcentaje de notas de evaluación registradas (0–1)

GradeDistribution.title: GradeDistribution
GradeDistribution.description: Distribución usando la escala 1–5 (calculada a partir de notas 0–100).

graded_pct_coverage.title: Graded Pct Coverage
graded_pct_coverage.description: Porcentaje de la nota total ya evaluado (0–100)

predicted_final_grade.title: Predicted Final Grade
predicted_final_grade.description: Nota predicha en escala 0–100. Solo si target=final_grade

predicted_scale_grade.title: Predicted Scale Grade
predicted_scale_grade.description: Nota predicha en escala 1–5. Solo si target=final_grade

pass_probability.title: Pass Probability
pass_probability.description: Probabilidad de aprobar (0–1). Solo si target=pass_probability

total_enrolled.title: Total Enrolled
total_enrolled.description: Total de inscripciones (puede repetir estudiantes entre cursos)
